Abigail: We always have so much candy left over at the end of the night.#$b#But I'm not complaining!
Alex: When I was a kid, I used to run to every house as fast as possible.#$b#I'd be done before six.
Caroline: $1 TrickOrTreat_Caroline#Please, take some candy.[(O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_RedSucker (O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_ChocolateEyeball (O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_GummySpider]#$e#I hope Abigail doesn't stay out too late tonight.#$b#It's getting cold.
Clint: I was too embarrassed to wear a costume, but now I'm the only one without one.$s
Demetrius: I'm dressed as deoxyribonucleic acid.#$b#Maru helped me with the assembly.
Elliott: $1 TrickOrTreat_Elliott#Care for a seaside snack? [(O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_FudgeNougat (O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_CandyCorn (O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_JojaBar (O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_ChocolateEyeball]#$e#There's certainly something otherwordly in the wind this evening.#$b#As autumn wanes and the boundary thins between our world and the spirits...
Emily: $1 TrickOrTreat_Emily#Trick or treat![(O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_RedSucker (O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_GummySpider (O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_JojaBar (O)243]#$e#My favorite part of trick-or-treating is getting to see everyone's costume.
Evelyn: $1 TrickOrTreat_Evelyn#Have a treat, dear.[(O)223 (O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_CaramelCandy]#$e#Have you collected a lot of candy?#$b#Don't eat it all in one night.
Gus: $1 TrickOrTreat_Gus#This candy is homemade by yours truly. Enjoy![(O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_FudgeNougat (O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_SaltwaterTaffy (O)612]#$e#The saloon will be open again at 10 o'clock. Feel free to come in and join us!
Haley: I'm too old to go trick-or-treating, but I still like to dress up.
Harvey: $1 TrickOrTreat_Harvey#Hello! Here, have a candy apple.[(O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_CandyApple]#$e#Too much candy isn't good for you, but a treat every now and then is alright.
Leah: $1 TrickOrTreat_Leah#Candy? Here you go.[(O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_FudgeNougat (O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_GummySpider]#$e#Do you like my decorations? It took a while to set up.
Lewis: $1 TrickOrTreat_Lewis#Would you like a treat?[(O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_CandyCorn (O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_CaramelCandy (O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_JojaBar]#$e#Are you enjoying the festival?
Marnie: $1 TrickOrTreat_Marnie#Thanks for visiting. Have a treat.[(O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_JojaBar (O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_CandyApple (O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_ChocolateEyeball]#$e#Stay awhile if you're getting cold.
Pam: Penny suggested I wear this costume.#$b#I don't really get it.
Penny: Vincent and Jas have been looking forward to tonight.
Pierre: Come to stock up on candy?
Robin: $1 TrickOrTreat_Robin#You deserve a treat for walking up here![(O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_JojaBar (O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_CaramelCandy (O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_FudgeNougat (O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_RedSucker (O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_GummySpider (O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_ChocolateEyeball (O)243 (O)279]#$e#We haven't had any trick-or-treaters yet.#$e#I guess it's a bit of a hike for just one house.
Sam: This might seem like a simple costume, but there's more to it than you'd think.#$e#If you leave the hem too long, you'll trip, and if you cut it too short, your ankles get cold.
Sebastian: Do you believe in ghosts, @?#$b#I think I saw one heading heading towards your farm...#$e#Just kidding!$h
Shane: Jas insisted I wear a costume today.#$e#Yes, those are pingpong balls.
Willy: $1 TrickOrTreat_Willy#This was my favorite treat when I was a boy.[(O)7socks.TrickOrTreat_SaltwaterTaffy]#$e#I don't have a sweet tooth myself, but I do enjoy a bit o' taffy.
